title: AT Field Nullified or eroded
wikitext:
[]: AT Field Nullified (or eroded)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Sep 29, 2009 10:14 pm When an Eva uses it's At Field to destroy an Angel's one, are both fields neutralized? Secondly, when an AT Field is extended defensively, how far is it extended from the user's body? Lastly, when an AT field is used offensively, does it have to be shifted from an "offensive" to a "defensive" mode?

[]: Re: AT Field Nullified (or eroded)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 29, 2009 11:43 pm CyberXIII wrote: When an Eva uses it's At Field to destroy an Angel's one, are both fields neutralized?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Wed Sep 30, 2009 6:22 am The way I see it it works like a sort of gradient: attacks can go one way but not the other, from the unit with the stronger extended AT Field to the other. Hence when Sachiel extends his field Unit 01 can't make contact, but then Unit 01 returns by pushing hers to a higher level than Sachiel's. Sachiel's eyebeam/cross attack then continues to wash over Unit 01 with no discernible effect, i.e. attack blocked. The idea of SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Thu Oct 01, 2009 8:59 am In the original NGE,the A.T.Field wasn't used like a weapon(except EoE - Anti A.T.Field.),it was just a Shield. But the RoE changed the meaning of the A.T.Field.It's added a new quality. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:38 am Dranzer wrote: In the original NGE,the A.T.Field wasn't used like a weapon(except EoE - Anti A.T.Field.),it was just a Shield.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:42 am Obviously some folks are forgetting about ep19 and Yui cutting Zeruel to pieces with her ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:45 am Dranzer wrote: In the original NGE,the A.T.Field wasn't used like a weapon(except EoE - Anti A.T.Field.),it was just a Shield.

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Thu Oct 01, 2009 1:15 pm wow i forgot about those moments this is an awkward situation a little off: Arael's light was an A.T.Field?Maya said that no thermal or A.T.Field detected.
